AC_CONFIG

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x2
Source:
dac_registers.rdl

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[15:8] - - - -
[7:4] amplitude rw 0xf -
[3:0] frequency rw 0x0 -

Field Descriptions

amplitude

Amplitude setting of the DAC. Describes a power of 2, so increase of 1 in this field will generate an amplitude twice as large as the previous code. 4'hF translates to full-scale.

frequency

Frequency setting of the DAC sine gen. Describes a power of 2, so increase of 1 in this field will generate a frequency twice as high as the previous.
